programs.title: Nature Gone Wild
programs.desc: Nature goes wild as astonished hunters encounter a talented bear that climbs trees and a bull moose who stops snowmobilers in their tracks.

programs.title: Ancient Aliens
programs.desc: With the help of various pieces of evidence, experts try to figure out whether extraterrestrials are able to alter human DNA and repopulate Earth.

actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programs.title: A Taste of Travel
programs.desc: Skye tastes the local produce in the Barossa Farmers Market. Meanwhile, Alana checks out a Roman fortress and Scotty visits Ravensthorpe.

programs.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programs.desc: The filmmaker explores some of the unusual causes of death including a lawnmower killing a football spectator, deadly beards and more.

actor: Dan Aykroyd,Adam Richman,Hakeem Oluseyi,Mitch Horowitz,Don Wildman,Martin K.A. Morgan

programs.title: Wonders of Men
programs.desc: Explore the historical marvel and rich culture embedded in the sculptures of Meenakshi Temple, which is situated on the banks of the Vaigai in Madurai.

director: Veronique Legendre,Celia Lowenstein,Bruno Victor-Pujebet,Bruno Ulmer,Delphine Cohen

programs.title: Shipping Wars
programs.desc: Jarrett Joyce faces trouble after winning a bid to transport a giant 40-foot colon. Meanwhile, Roy locks horns with the owner of a large video game.

actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko
